clusters.title: Prize Pack Family-Only Rows
clusters.summary: Source family alone is not enough to create stamped identity. Rows still need explicit printed series or stamp evidence before lawful canon routing.

blocked_examples.blocker_detail: Prize Pack family rows still lack an explicit printed series or stamp phrase.
Prize Pack family rows still lack an explicit printed series or stamp phrase.
Prize Pack family rows still lack an explicit printed series or stamp phrase.

clusters.title: Prize Pack Series Marker Rows
clusters.summary: Explicit "Prize Pack Series N" markers are identity-bearing and can route to a unique underlying base row by stripped name plus printed number and total.

clusters.title: Expansion-Name Stamp Overlays
clusters.summary: Explicit expansion-name stamp phrases route through the named expansion first, then resolve the unique base card by stripped name plus printed number and total.

blocked_examples.blocker_detail: Expansion-name stamp did not resolve to exactly one matching base row after normalized number and printed-total routing.

clusters.title: Event And Prerelease Base-Route Overlays
clusters.summary: Explicit event or prerelease overlays can reuse the existing stamped rule when the underlying base row is globally unique by stripped name plus printed number and total.

clusters.title: Battle Academy Overlay Rows
clusters.summary: These rows belong to the Battle Academy curated-product overlay domain and must not be forced through the stamped backlog.

blocked_examples.blocker_detail: Battle Academy rows are governed by the separate Battle Academy canon contract.
Battle Academy rows are governed by the separate Battle Academy canon contract.
Battle Academy rows are governed by the separate Battle Academy canon contract.

clusters.title: Mega Evolution Promo Staff/Prerelease Rows
clusters.summary: The current backlog proves stamped modifiers exist, but it does not yet prove whether the underlying identity space is a promo family or routed expansion base row.

blocked_examples.blocker_detail: Mega Evolution promo rows still need authoritative proof for promo-family identity space versus routed base-set reuse.
Mega Evolution promo rows still need authoritative proof for promo-family identity space versus routed base-set reuse.
Mega Evolution promo rows still need authoritative proof for promo-family identity space versus routed base-set reuse.

clusters.title: Professor Program Family-Hint Rows
clusters.summary: Professor Program source-family hints do not capture enough printed evidence to create stamped identity without a stronger external proof surface.

blocked_examples.blocker_detail: Professor Program family hints do not include enough printed modifier evidence to define stamped identity.
Professor Program family hints do not include enough printed modifier evidence to define stamped identity.
Professor Program family hints do not include enough printed modifier evidence to define stamped identity.
